title: Tool Registry
description: Registry of tools available for LLM function calling. Each tool maps to an ops command.

name.description: Tool name (kebab-case). Must match ops command naming.

description.description: Human-readable tool description for LLM context.

parameters.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input parameters.

ops_command.description: Ops manage.py command name to dispatch to.

permission.description: Tool permission level. Mutating tools require confirmation.

allowed_providers.description: Provider IDs that support this tool. Empty/absent = all providers.
